summary: Implemented two features: (1) getToolDescription() — a new exported function in tool-call-utils.ts that returns properly Title-cased, human-readable tool descriptions matching the spec (e.g. 'Reading src/foo.ts', 'Running `git status`', 'Searching for \'pattern\' in path', 'Fetching https://...'); (2) Context tool grouping — added partitionByContext(), isContextTool(), CONTEXT_TOOL_NAMES, and describeContextGroup() to tool-call-utils.ts; added ContextGroupHeader and ContextAwareToolList components to ToolCallGroup.tsx; updated ToolSegmentDispatch in MessageBubble.tsx to use partitionByContext() so consecutive read/glob/grep/ls/web_fetch calls are grouped under 'Gathering context...' with a count badge while streaming and 'Gathered context (N files read, M searches)' with a collapsible expand when done. Non-context tools (write, edit, bash) always render individually. Individual tool results remain viewable by expanding the group.
